title: Age of Steam  Workshop Expansion
description: addon for Age of Steam that adds material processing blocks
body:
This is the first expansion pack for Age of Steam:  Workshop Expansion

It adds the following blocks:

- Mechanical Sieve to process sand, gravel, dust and find valuable resources
- Manual Spinning Wheel to make strings from wool
- Millstone (=crusher) to process wheat or crush ores
- Woodmill to cut wood into planks
- (maybe in future): Mixer to mix a liquid with solids, for example to create slime

all machines will have a config where you can add / remove recipes as you like.


you can find more information on the curseforge page: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/age-of-steam-workshop-expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/age-of-steam-workshop-expansion)
